title: rubus multibracteatus
intro: Rubus multibracteatus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a species of bramble that belongs to the rose family. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus multibracteatus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support cardiovascular health. Rubus multibracteatus can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, allowing for various herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
